behaviors.description: Missing required key across file+env reports exact config path (e.g., `database.host`).
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module boundaries (file load + env overlay + required-key validator + error formatter), not one pure function. REAL-INFRA: no real network/subprocess/OS primitive is required; in-process config text + env map is sufficient, so System is disqualified by behavior text ('absent from both the file and the environment'). LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no AI model or agent pipeline mentioned, so Agentic/Workflow are disqualified.
behaviors.test_description: Run loader with a temp config missing `database.host` and with `TOOL_DATABASE_HOST` unset; assert startup fails and the emitted actionable error contains the exact path string `database.host`.

behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: boundary is env -> path resolver -> loader open path, so multiple modules must be wired. REAL-INFRA: local temp filesystem is enough; no subprocess/network/OS-specific event semantics are required, so System is disqualified by behavior text (only path selection rule is specified). LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no model output dependence, so Agentic/Workflow are disqualified.
behaviors.test_description: Set `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` to a temp directory containing `tool/config.yaml`, also place a different file under `~/.config/tool/config.yaml`; run loader and assert values come from the XDG location.

behaviors.description: `TOOL_` environment values override conflicting YAML file values.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: precedence bug appears at handoff between YAML parser output and env-override merge logic. REAL-INFRA: deterministic in-process setup (temp file + env vars) reproduces failure; no real network/subprocess needed, so System is disqualified by behavior text ('environment variable ... conflicts with a key in the config file'). LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no AI decision path, so Agentic/Workflow are disqualified.
behaviors.test_description: Create config with a known key/value, set conflicting `TOOL_...` env var, run loader, and assert resulting config uses env value.

behaviors.description: YAML syntax errors report detected line number in the startup error.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: this is parser exception -> loader error translation integration; mocking parser can hide real exception shape/line metadata mapping. REAL-INFRA: no subprocess/network/OS behavior required; real YAML library call in-process is enough, so System is disqualified by behavior text ('YAML syntax error' with line reporting). LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no AI model involvement, so Agentic/Workflow are disqualified.
behaviors.test_description: Provide malformed YAML with a known bad line, run loader, assert failure message includes that line number and remains actionable.

behaviors.description: If config directory is absent, loader creates it and writes defaults before continuing.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is in interaction of startup flow + filesystem write path + subsequent load. REAL-INFRA: requires local filesystem I/O (mkdir/write), but not subprocess/network or cross-OS event semantics; Integration with temp dir is sufficient, so System is considered but disqualified by behavior text (simple create/write behavior only). LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no model calls, so Agentic/Workflow are disqualified.
behaviors.test_description: Start with empty temp home/XDG root where config dir does not exist; run loader; assert directory and defaults file are created and loader proceeds using defaults.
